Product Details
VA / VS Water Seals

Axial-contact sealing elements for splash protection, contaminant exclusion, and light sealing duty on rotating shafts.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

VA / VS Water Seals

A practical option for equipment exposed to water, dust, and splash where easy installation and shaft adaptability matter.

VA and VS Water Seals use all-rubber axial lip structures that rotate with the shaft to help keep out contaminants and improve the protection of the primary sealing arrangement.

Axial Sealing Lip

Seals against a stationary counterface and can also act as a flinger in wet environments.

Contaminant Barrier

Helps keep water, mud, and dust away from bearings and primary shaft seals.

Simple Installation

The flexible rubber design can be fitted over shafts and adjacent parts with practical assembly convenience.

Product Specification
